new_tasks.title: Non-clinical pay uplift kick-off meeting
new_tasks.description: Jasmin Khokhra has initiated a non-clinical pay uplift kick-off meeting. UCEA communication expected but main holiday season is approaching. Kevin needs to engage with this initiative and coordinate timing with the team's availability.
